mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_correction ( book_id, chapter_id, submitted_by, original_text, corrected_text, context_before, context_after, start_position, end_position, user_note, status, created_at, epub_cfi, section_href ) VALUES ( #{bookId}, #{chapterId}, #{submittedBy}, #{originalText}, #{correctedText}, #{contextBefore}, #{contextAfter}, #{startPosition}, #{endPosition}, #{userNote}, 'PENDING', NOW(), #{epubCfi}, #{sectionHref} )
mapper.select: SELECT cc.*, bc.title AS chapter_title, bc.chapter_number, b.title AS book_title, u.username AS submitted_by_username FROM content_correction cc JOIN book_chapters bc ON cc.chapter_id = bc.id JOIN books b ON cc.book_id = b.id JOIN users u ON cc.submitted_by = u.id WHERE cc.id = #{id}

SELECT cc.*, bc.title AS chapter_title, bc.chapter_number, b.title AS book_title, u.username AS submitted_by_username FROM content_correction cc JOIN book_chapters bc ON cc.chapter_id = bc.id JOIN books b ON cc.book_id = b.id JOIN users u ON cc.submitted_by = u.id WHERE cc.status = CAST(#{status} AS correction_status) ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PENDING' THEN cc.created_at END ASC, CASE WHEN #{status} != 'PENDING' THEN cc.reviewed_at END DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_correction WHERE status = CAST(#{status} AS correction_status)

SELECT cc.*, bc.title AS chapter_title, bc.chapter_number, b.title AS book_title, u.username AS submitted_by_username FROM content_correction cc JOIN book_chapters bc ON cc.chapter_id = bc.id JOIN books b ON cc.book_id = b.id JOIN users u ON cc.submitted_by = u.id WHERE cc.chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND cc.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY cc.start_position ASC
SELECT start_position FROM content_correction WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND start_position IS NOT NULL ORDER BY start_position ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE content_correction SET status = CAST(#{status} AS correction_status), reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT u.full_name FROM content_correction cc JOIN users u ON cc.reviewed_by = u.id WHERE cc.book_id = #{bookId} AND cc.status = 'APPROVED' AND cc.reviewed_by IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.full_name ASC

SELECT cc.*, bc.title AS chapter_title, bc.chapter_number, b.title AS book_title, u.username AS submitted_by_username FROM content_correction cc JOIN book_chapters bc ON cc.chapter_id = bc.id JOIN books b ON cc.book_id = b.id JOIN users u ON cc.submitted_by = u.id WHERE cc.status = CAST(#{status} AS correction_status) AND cc.submitted_by = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PENDING' THEN cc.created_at END ASC, CASE WHEN #{status} != 'PENDING' THEN cc.reviewed_at END DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_correction WHERE status = CAST(#{status} AS correction_status) AND submitted_by = #{userId}

SELECT cc.*, bc.title AS chapter_title, bc.chapter_number, b.title AS book_title, u.username AS submitted_by_username FROM content_correction cc JOIN book_chapters bc ON cc.chapter_id = bc.id JOIN books b ON cc.book_id = b.id JOIN users u ON cc.submitted_by = u.id WHERE cc.book_id = #{bookId} AND cc.submitted_by = #{userId} AND cc.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY cc.created_at DESC
